text.title: AWS Service Selection (Compute, Database, Architecture Decisions) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: profile-workload
step.action: Characterise: handler duration, state shape, throughput, batch vs interactive.

step.name: pick-database
step.action: Apply ddb-key-value-only rule. Default to DDB for KV, Aurora SLv2 for relational.

step.name: evaluate-6-pillars
step.action: Evaluate against OpEx / Sec / Rel / Perf / Cost / Sustain.

step.name: gap-list
step.action: List gaps + severity + remediation owner. Sign off before prod.
